steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that "many of the companies could not operate" if they had to find investors on their own. The blank must describe the cost or difficulty of doing so — something that makes it impossible or impractical, not merely notable or positive.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'distinctive': means standing out or being unique — not an obstacle. ✗
  • Choice B — 'misconstrued': means misunderstood — unrelated to cost or burden. ✗
  • Choice C — 'prohibitive': means making something impossible or impractical due to cost or difficulty — exactly what the passage establishes: without the exchange, the burden of finding investors would prevent companies from operating. ✓
  • Choice D — 'beneficial': is the opposite of what the passage describes. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
